metadata.name: Remote Start Vehicle in Cold Weather

description: On a cold morning, a customer wants to remote start their car to warm it up before they leave for work.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and verify their identity via their mobile app PIN.
Send a remote command to start the vehicle's engine and activate climate controls.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the 'start' command with climate set to 72°F.

nodes.task_description: Confirm to the customer that the command was sent successfully and the vehicle should be running.
